sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68142" key="mitrw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μιτρ-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n68142.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a headband, An.Ox.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:351" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.351</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
